'''âp-j-zh-y''' ('''kapajzheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lamp|lamp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-j-zh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lamp|lamp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-j-zh-y
|-
! Lemma
| kapajzheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thipajzheyoko || jipajzheyoko || shipajzheyoko || kipajzheyoko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthupajzheyoko || jujupajzheyoko || shushupajzheyoko || kukupajzheyoko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thupajzheyoko || jupajzheyoko || shupajzheyoko || kupajzheyoko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thupajzheyoko || jupajzheyoko || shupajzheyoko || kupajzheyoko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thepajzheyoko || jepajzheyoko || shepajzheyoko || kepajzheyoko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothopajzheyoko || jojopajzheyoko || shoshopajzheyoko || kokopajzheyoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thopajzheyoko || jopajzheyoko || shopajzheyoko || kopajzheyoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thopajzheyoko || jopajzheyoko || shopajzheyoko || kopajzheyoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko || pajzheyoko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠpajzheyoko || jĂŠpajzheyoko || shĂŠpajzheyoko || kĂŠpajzheyoko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathapajzheyoko || jajapajzheyoko || shashapajzheyoko || kakapajzheyoko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thapajzheyoko || japajzheyoko || shapajzheyoko || kapajzheyoko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thapajzheyoko || japajzheyoko || shapajzheyoko || kapajzheyoko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shapajzheyithi || shapajzheyiji || shapajzheyishi || shapajzheyiki
